product.name: SEALIGHT Tesla Model Y Floor Mats 5 Seat 2021-2024, All Weather Custom Fit Floor Liners, 1st & 2nd Row Full Coverage, 3D Scanning Design, Non-Slip TPE Material, Waterproof & Stain-Resistant
product.description: Tired of dealing with muddy footprints, stubborn stains, or the hassle of cleaning your car's interior after every adventure? Keep your Tesla Model Y pristine with our premium all-weather floor mats. Engineered with precision 3D scanning technology, these custom-fit Tesla Model Y floor mats provide full coverage for both 1st and 2nd rows, ensuring complete protection against dirt, spills, and wear. The high-quality TPE material is not only waterproof and stain-resistant but also features a non-slip surface that keeps you safe on every drive. Our Tesla Model Y 2023 floor mats combine durability with thoughtful design. The high edges contain messes effectively, while the odorless, non-toxic material maintains your car's air quality. Installation takes seconds, yet the mats stay securely in place during daily use. At [Brand Name], we believe in creating products that enhance your driving experience without compromise. Each Tesla Model Y all-weather floor mat undergoes rigorous testing to meet our high standards for quality and performance. Imagine stepping into your clean Tesla day after day, no matter the weather outside. Whether it's winter slush, summer sand, or unexpected spills, your Model Y's interior remains protected and looking showroom-new. Upgrade your vehicle's protection today with these essential Tesla accessories.
features: All-Weather Protection & Full Coverage: Engineered with high-quality TPE and 3D scanning design, our Tesla Model Y floor mats provide complete protection against water, stains, and debris, ensuring your car interior stays pristine in any condition.

Custom Fit for Tesla Model Y 2021-2024: Precisely tailored using advanced 3D scanning technology, these mats offer a perfect fit for 1st & 2nd row seats, staying securely in place with non-slip backing for ultimate driving safety.

Premium TPE Material & Odorless Design: Made from wear-resistant, recyclable TPE that's non-toxic and odorless, these Tesla Model Y all weather floor mats combine durability with a clean, fresh cabin environment.

Easy to Clean & Maintain: Featuring a waterproof and stain-resistant surface, these Tesla mats can be quickly wiped clean or rinsed off, saving you time while keeping your Model Y looking showroom-ready.

High Edge Design & Effortless Installation: The raised edges trap spills and dirt, while the lightweight construction allows for easy installation and removal - no tools required for full-coverage protection.
